Title: Ama~i yûwaku! Hebi-hime-sama no omotenashi
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Tôru Furuya, Mayumi Tanaka
Plot: Having caught up to where he was when he fell, Goku continues down Hebi no Michi. He stops at a palace, thinking it to be where Kaio-Sama lives, but it turns out to belong to Hebi Hime, who likes him so much that she won't let him...
